title: Man in a Maze
overview: The mysterious death of a soldier in Greece causes suspicion. Lloyd's sends Keaton as an insurance investigator.

title: Little Giant
overview: Bounty hunters stakes out a former German Red Army member, Rosa. Keaton is hired by her wealthy family to protect her.

title: Strange Tales of Lasagna
overview: Keaton is hired to retrieve nine year old Flora from Italy. They flee for France where her mother waits.

title: Immortal Man
overview: Keaton saves the "immortal man" from the Russian Mafia. The man reveals the secret of the Romanov Treasures.

title: Paris Under the Roof
overview: After being fired from a college in Tokyo, Keaton finds a job as an instructor at an adult education center in France. There he meets...

title: White Goddess
overview: Keaton meets Anna in Scilly Islands in England, who is protecting an archaeological site all by herself.

title: Memories of Summer Pudding
overview: Keaton, hoping to spend the summer vacation alone with Yuriko, heads for a farmhouse where he spent summers as a boy.

title: The Negotiator's Rule
overview: Keaton heads for the countryside in England to rescue a kidnapped manager of a Japanese electronics corporation.

title: Traveling with a Lady
overview: Keaton meets an arrogant old lady on a train from Germany to Switzerland who claims to be pursued by the Czech Secret Service.

title: Charlie
overview: Keaton helps a childhood friend Charlie Chapman, also a world-renowned detective, with the murder case of an art dealer.

title: Special Menu
overview: Keaton assists an Englishman to become a Chinese chef with the help of a secret recipe.

title: A Case for Ladies
overview: Keaton and an elderly woman who loves detective movies pursue the truth behind a high-profile murder case.

title: A Peaceful Death
overview: A terrorist finds his conscience and seeks Keaton's help to locate and defuse two IRA bombs in a crowded London shopping mall.

title: Wall in One's Heart
overview: Keaton helps a German businessman to locate his long-lost daughter while she seeks to avenge her mother's death in a labor camp in East Germany.

title: A Long and Hot Day
overview: An attack dog ruthlessly stalks Keaton deep in the mountains of Spain.

title: The Elm Tree Forever
overview: Earl Fenders' bankruptcy leaves him a broken man, but his son, Robert, needs his fathers overbearing personality to inspire his music - can Keaton restore the father's domineering arrogance?

title: A Mansion of Roses
overview: Edmond Layman was found murdered in his rose garden and his widow fears for her life. Their gardener, Eric, disappeared and is the chief suspect but Keaton soon unburies a thorny secret!

title: Faker's Miscalculation
overview: Professor Bennington runs for Chancellor to save the college only to be targeted by a team of con men. But will the con men's professional pride lead them to change their minds?

title: Into the Vast Sky...
overview: Keaton's daughter meets a childhood friend who wants to free a hawk. Keaton and the boy's father secretly follow out of concern for the boy who also desperately wants to be free.

title: The Island of Coward
overview: The Polish Mafia takes over Keaton's hotel in a blaze of gunfire. Although accused of being cowards for their inaction, Keaton and a secret legend use their experience to win despite the terrible odds.

title: The Thistle Emblem
overview: Keaton flies to Scotland to investigate a watch preserved in a shrine in Japan.

title: Chateau Lajonchee 1944
overview: Keaton visits Burgundy to insure the extraordinary vintage wine Chateau Lajonchee 1944.

title: No Way Out
overview: Keaton must escort a fugitive through a perilous road across a bottomless swamp.

title: The Day the Op Was Born
overview: Keaton recalls the first time he met Daniel and became the insurance investigator 10 years ago...

title: Kalihman of the Desert
overview: Keaton and the excavation team are left for dead in the Taklimakan Desert.

title: Family
overview: Keaton, asked to recruit a former East German Olympic swimmer, but first Keaton must deal with the swimmer's depression and face off against a group of skinheads.

title: The Red Wind
overview: Razin left Russia to attend an air show in the UK, but after his two bodyguards are murdered, Keaton finds himself between Razin and a killer KGB agent.

title: A Message from Alexeyev
overview: While visiting a resort on a Spanish island, Keaton meets Sendel who reveals a tale of passion and betrayal between Russian agents and locals the Spanish Civil War 50 years ago.

title: The Forbidden Fruit
overview: Keaton crashes a party for the newest board member of the premiere accounting firm in the UK after he suspects the board member of murdering his way to the top!

title: The Highlands in Your Eyes
overview: Keaton attempts to rescue an artist forced to paint forgeries who has been held hostage in a house by his extreme shortsightedness and his shattered confidence.

title: The Scent is the Key
overview: A man requests Keaton to investigate the untimely death of his friend who lacked a "scent of death."

title: The Back Street
overview: A reluctant Keaton believes he is handing enticement money to a woman on behalf of her father, but soon discovers quite a different story.

title: Devil Like an Angel
overview: Keaton searches for a Japanese art student in Italy only to discover the student has become involved with a terrorist group!

title: The Agate Color of Time
overview: Keaton shares stories of his youth in Cornwall with his daughter, Yuriko.

title: Love in May
overview: Keaton's daughter becomes involved in a purse-snatching investigation in London while her father rests his broken leg in the hospital.

title: Blue Friday
overview: While Keaton chases after an elusive insurance beneficiary, his parter Daniel pursues a new beauty.

title: Interview Day
overview: Keaton, unsure about pursuing a career as an archaeologist, allows himself to be distracted by his father on his way to an interview at Tozai University.

title: Hunting Season Part 1
overview: Two knife murders in London drags Keaton into a chase tying the SAS to a vicious drug ring.

title: Hunting Season Part 2
overview: Two knife murders in London drags Keaton into a chase tying the SAS to a vicious drug ring.
